chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ ابْنَ آدَمَ أَجْوَفُ لَا بُدَّ لَهُ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – The son of Adamas is hollow, there is no escape for him from the food

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/99)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/99)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي الْخُبْزِ وَ لَا تُفَرِّقْ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَهُ فَلَوْ لَا الْخُبْزُ مَا صُمْنَا وَ لَا صَلَّيْنَا وَ لَا أَدَّيْنَا فَرَائِضَ رَبِّنَا عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Abu Al Bakhtary, raising it, said:

‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Bless us in the bread, and do not Cause separation between us and it, for had there not been for the bread, neither would we have (been able to) Fast, nor Pray, nor fulfill the Obligations of our Lord<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from abu al-Bakhtariy in a marfu‘ manner has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘O Lord, grant us blessings in bread and do not separate it from us. If bread had not been available, we could not fast or perform Salat (prayer) or fulfill any of our obligation toward our Lord, most Majestic, most Glorious.”’
